Accommodation

Rooms designed for restful days

Every room at Hotel Kleopatra opens to the sea. Soft linens, natural light and a private balcony — your sanctuary above the Adriatic.

Sea View

Comfort Double Room

from
€75/n

Sea view for two

A bright, air-conditioned room with a king bed, private balcony and sweeping Adriatic views. Satellite TV, fridge and en-suite shower complete your stay.

2 Guests · 1 King Bed
15 m²Balcony
  • Sea View
  • Private Balcony
  • Air Conditioning
  • Free WiFi
  • Satellite TV
  • Fridge
  • En-suite Shower
Sea View

Comfort Triple Room

from
€95/n

Space to share

Generously proportioned with a king bed and a single bed, this room offers a balcony overlooking the sea — perfect for small families or friends.

3 Guests · 1 King + 1 Twin
19 m²Balcony
  • Sea View
  • Private Balcony
  • Air Conditioning
  • Free WiFi
  • Satellite TV
  • Fridge
  • En-suite Shower
Sea View

Two-Bedroom Apartment

from
€120/n

Home above the sea

A self-contained apartment with two separate bedrooms, a kitchenette and a balcony. Ideal for families or couples wanting extra space and privacy.

4 Guests · 2 Bedrooms
25 m²Balcony

  • Satellite TV
  • Fridge
Sea View

Three-Bedroom Apartment

from
€180/n

The whole family together

Our largest accommodation offering 65 m² of living space across three bedrooms, full kitchen and a large balcony with panoramic sea views.

6 Guests · 3 Bedrooms
65 m²Balcony

Best rate guaranteed when you book directly — no platform fees, our full attention.

Explore all 23 room types
Book with confidence

Why book directly with us

When you reserve through our website, you skip the third-party fees and speak directly with our family. We know every room and every view — let us help you choose the one that fits.

Best rate guaranteed when booking direct
Free cancellation up to 48 hours before arrival
Complimentary WiFi in all rooms and common areas
Fresh breakfast buffet included with every stay
Free on-site parking — no reservation needed
Early check-in and late checkout on request

Reserve Direct

Your Adriatic escape begins here

Book directly with us for the best available rate, flexible terms and a personal welcome from the Kleopatra family.

  • Best rate — guaranteed
  • No booking fees
  • Priority room selection
  • Complimentary welcome drink
  • Free cancellation flexibility
  • Direct concierge support

Request your stay

Tell us your dates — we'll confirm availability personally.

Letters from the coast

Seasonal offers, quiet-season escapes and stories from Ulcinj — a few times a year, never more.

Hotel Kleopatra
Ulcinj · Montenegro

A family-run hotel above the Adriatic, where every guest arrives as a stranger and leaves as a friend.
